不然寄刀片了[哭][哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728451576,"group_id":"7324887855577189438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"夫君昨晚劳累过度，卧病在床。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxc/gtn9dcm1VZ17T64y3EQXD6kY3v9J8qvbzNU6GUDF","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a40c771ed73c41dfb78d2cc632c60ca3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618544&x-signature=BMtIGLBb9VTlTJkVynmISE9890A%3D","user_id":"1632139008819038","user_name":"炸天帮帮主对象"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1632139008819038","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324887855577189438","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽+山海经+野史+神明复苏+单或双女主】
（本文野史纯属虚构，仅供娱乐，请勿当真）
祖夏、皇商、天周的大神秘;
仙秦、神汉、圣唐的传说;
道宋、魔元、武明、妖清的野史秘闻……
林炎穿越御兽世界，觉醒山海经，重现华夏神兽。
开局领取御三家，
【烈焰犬】→【炎魔帝君】→【穷奇】/【祸斗】
【冰河龟】→【极寒龙龟】→【玄武】/【霸下】
……
独一无二的华夏神兽进化路线，十八只山海神兽诞生世间。
“西方爬虫也配称龙？让你们看清楚，华流才是最吊的!”
外神入侵，大平洋上，神兽长城气势如虹。
林炎刀指诸神，
“宙斯、奥丁、伊邪那美！”
“我林炎，代华夏诸圣，诛神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c67b257ef4015c17be5141cc473f01f","author":"神下阡陌","author_id":"","book_id":"7324887855577189438","book_name":"御兽：从山海经到执掌神话","book_short_name":"御山海","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7324990254690075198","read_count":"23902","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2022961"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"990","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/760be666254e5fad5dd23b780e617e9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290204&x-signature=BAoPxUnPyK5SJT6Tc7YlDxDcCfk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1758826088891486","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"627"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":37439,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":66461,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":25201},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1736758883,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7465804810856497982","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，值得大家一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738281368,"group_id":"7324887855577189438","service_id":1 下文笔，没事的时候可以写日记，评分有望突破8.5。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759850022,"group_id":"7324887855577189438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"也许大概我是男的吧。
(我书架没什么好东西，看完的书都移出去了，好书都看完了。)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yzl+cV8jDk9R4YqVuimKtSeua+chdmVn69VNvyIKGe","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/baa989331cb748d583a9505744190d24~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621332&x-signature=fuTk6pGMC8ZR18TIbMXERiCZyp8%3D","user_id":"3570836916156584","user_name":"没斤九两"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3570836916156584","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324887855577189438","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽+山海经+野史+神明复苏+单或双女主】
（本文野史纯属虚构，仅供娱乐，请勿当真）
祖夏、皇商、天周的大神秘;
仙秦、神汉、圣唐的传说;
道宋、魔元、武明、妖清的野史秘闻……
林炎穿越御兽世界，觉醒山海经，重现华夏神兽。
开局领取御三家，
【烈焰犬】→【炎魔帝君】→【穷奇】/【祸斗】
【冰河龟】→【极寒龙龟】→【玄武】/【霸下】
……
独一无二的华夏神兽进化路线，十八只山海神兽诞生世间。
“西方爬虫也配称龙？让你们看清楚，华流才是最吊的!”
外神入侵，大平洋上，神兽长城气势如虹。
林炎刀指诸神，
“宙斯、奥丁、伊邪那美！”
“我林炎，代华夏诸圣，诛神！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c67b257ef4015c17be5141cc473f01f","author":"神下阡陌","author_id":"","book_id":"7324887855577189438","book_name":"御兽：从山海经到执掌神话","book_short_name":"御山海","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7324990254690075198","read_count":"23902","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2022961"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"990","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/760be666254e5fad5dd23b780e617e9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290204&x-signature=BAoPxUnPyK5SJT6Tc7YlDxDcCfk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1758826088891486","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读35分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2093,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10627},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7563216575778210585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"8.7 祖夏、皇商、天周的大神秘;
仙秦、神汉、圣唐的传说;
道宋、魔元、武明、妖清的野史秘闻……
林炎穿越御兽世界，觉醒山海经，重现华夏神兽。
开局领取御三家，
【烈焰犬】→【炎魔帝君】→【穷奇】/【祸斗】
【冰河龟】→【极寒龙龟】→【玄武】/【霸下】
……
独一无二的华夏神兽进化路线，十八只山海神兽诞生世间。
“西方爬虫也配称龙？让你们看清楚，华流才是最吊的!”
外神入侵，大平洋上，神兽长城气势如虹。
林炎刀指诸神，
“宙斯、奥丁、伊邪那美！”
